zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Tosny於1235年9月29日出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德時，他的父親Ralph de Tosny45歲，母親Petronilla de Lacy40歲。他和Alice de Bohun至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1264年在他的家鄉享年29歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Tosny was born on 29 September 1235, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Tosny, was 45 and his mother, Petronilla de Lacy, was 40. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Alice de Bohun. He died in 1264, in his hometown, at the age of 29, and was buried in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Tosny est né le 29 septembre 1235, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Tosny, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Petronilla de Lacy, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Bohun. Il est décédé en 1264, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Tosny am 29. September 1235 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Tosny 45 und seine Mutter Petronilla de Lacy 40. Er hatte mit Alice de Bohun mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1264 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Tosny è nato il il 29 settembre 1235 nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Tosny, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Petronilla de Lacy, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Alice de Bohun. Morì nel 1264, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Tosnyが1235年9月29日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで生まれた時，父Ralph de Tosnyは45歳，母Petronilla de Lacyは40歳であった。彼はAlice de Bohunとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年に故郷で29歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Tosny(이)가 1235년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Tosny(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronilla de Lacy(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Alice de Bohun(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Tosny nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1235, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Tosny, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla de Lacy, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Alice de Bohun. Ele faleceu em 1264, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Tosny родился 29 сентября 1235 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Tosny было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla de Lacy, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Alice de Bohun. Он умер в 1264 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Tosny nació el 29 de septiembre de 1235, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Tosny, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Petronilla de Lacy, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Alice de Bohun. Murió en 1264, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
